rationale: The citing article is an editorial retrospective on JMR editorship and review operations (including the 2005–2006 interim period), while the cited 2004 paper is itself a JMR editorial focused on journal positioning and review-process policy (the 2x2x2 system). Given this strong topical overlap in editorial governance/history and a direct DOI-matched reference, this does not look like an obviously incidental mention.
